raw_consumer_statement:
In connection with a dispute with Bestbuy over a purchased product that was not delivered in box ( which case we just won in court ). I spoke with someone over the phone who claimed to be a Bestbuy customer service representative ; however, the individual was not a representative from Bestbuy.

The individual used our account information to make charges totaling {$400.00}, which we did not authorize. This is a case of digital identity theft. We have photos of the alerts to our phones regarding this fraudulent charge, a confirmation photo ( email ) from XXXX who helped us regain control to our XXXX XXXX XXXX and a copy of a filed police report. 

Citi Bank via a Bestbuy letterhead did not provide us with a detailed account of their internal investigation. We would like Citi Bank to reimburse the {$400.00} to us.
